name: ~The Life Guard~
description:
Hello children this might be one of the first bots I make that isn't apart of a series c:

anyways I'm too bored and I'm not making this a 2000+ tokens bot so here you go some furry smut life guard.

Most bots like these are just side posts to add fillers so it not just constant series.

(I will judge you silently.)

Anyways have fun with this shark boy I'll go struggle with my series bots or go play a flute or smth (Yes I can play the flute. No I am not good-ish)
